title: Northrop Grumman Manta Ray XL-UUV
summary: Autonomous, energy-efficient unmanned underwater vehicle, field-assemblable from 5 shipping-container-sized pieces.
details: DARPA's Manta Ray prototype successfully completed in-water testing of propulsion, steering, and ballast operations off the coast of Southern California. The extra-large unmanned underwater vehicle (XL-UUV) is designed for long-range, high-endurance autonomous underwater missions without requiring on-site human support or hosting infrastructure.

title: Maven Smart System (Dec 2025 Test)
summary: Integration of AI/ML targeting capabilities into military services, part of Project Maven's joint-force exercises.
details: Project Maven's Smart System, powered by Palantir, underwent significant joint-force operational testing. This milestone focused on real-time integration of machine learning algorithms with command-and-control sensors to accelerate targeting workflows and enhance battlespace situational awareness.

sources.label: Palantir Expands Maven Smart System AI/ML Capabilities
CBS News: AI Warfare Joint Exercise Coverage

title: Maven Smart System (May 2026 Exercise)
summary: Live-fire and tactical integration of Project Maven's AI-driven targeting pipeline in active military scenarios.
details: A major joint exercise in mid-2026 demonstrated the live deployment of the Maven Smart System. This operational test evaluated its capability to handle rapid sensor-to-shooter targeting, tactical threat detection, and AI-assisted weapon-allocation recommendations in a highly contested environment.

sources.label: Palantir Expands Maven Smart System AI/ML Capabilities
CBS News: AI Warfare Joint Exercise Coverage

title: GenAI.mil / Exercise Arctic Bridge
summary: Generative AI used for tactical logistics tabletop exercise scenarios tailored to Arctic conditions.
details: The 732nd Air Mobility Squadron leveraged the custom GenAI.mil platform (powered by Gemini) to execute a specialized tabletop exercise in Alaska. The system rapidly drafted complex scenario injects, logistical challenges, and weather hazards tailored to unique sub-zero conditions, reducing scenario planning times from weeks to minutes.

sources.label: 732nd AMS leverages AI to enhance Arctic TTX
